name: Potential Exchange Exploit Activity Detected
notes:
This rule detects potential Exchange exploit activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Exchange Exploitation Activity
SIGMA Description: Detects activity observed by different researchers to be HAFNIUM group activity (or related) on Exchange servers


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%attrib%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +h %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +s %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +r %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.aspx%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%schtasks%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vsperfmon%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vssadmin list shadows%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%temp\__output%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(%temp%\\execute\.bat).*?' ) OR ( LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%users\public\opera\opera_browser.exe' ) OR ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'opera_browser.exe' AND LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") in ('services.exe', 'svchost.exe') ) OR ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\programdata\vsperfmon\' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -t7z%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\pst%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\it.zip%' ) OR ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'makecab.exe' AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%microsoft\exchange server\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%inetpub\wwwroot%' ) ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\temp\xx.bat%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windows\wwansvcdcs%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windows\temp\cw.exe%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\comsvcs.dll%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%minidump%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\inetpub\wwwroot%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dsquery%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -uco %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\inetpub\wwwroot%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Exchange Exploit Activity Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%attrib%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +h %' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +s %' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +r %' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.aspx%' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%schtasks%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vsperfmon%' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vssadmin list shadows%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%temp\__output%' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(%temp%\\execute\.bat).*?' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%users\public\opera\opera_browser.exe' ) OR ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'opera_browser.exe' 	AND LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") in ('services.exe', 'svchost.exe') ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\programdata\vsperfmon\' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -t7z%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\pst%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\it.zip%' ) OR ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'makecab.exe' 	AND  	( 		LOWER("Command") LIKE '%microsoft\exchange server\%' 		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%inetpub\wwwroot%' 	) ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\temp\xx.bat%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windows\wwansvcdcs%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%windows\temp\cw.exe%' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\comsvcs.dll%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%minidump%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\inetpub\wwwroot%' ) OR  (	 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dsquery%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -uco %' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\inetpub\wwwroot%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Exchange Exploit Activity Detected
Event description: Detects potential Exchange exploit activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
